# Jesus Rules Ministries

> A 501(c)(3) nonprofit using professional beach volleyball to spread the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

## Overview

Jesus Rules Ministries is a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization founded in 2021 in Irvine, California. The ministry combines competitive excellence in professional beach volleyball with Gospel outreach, discipleship training, and community engagement. The core belief is that Christians are called to be in the world — competing at the highest level, earning credibility, and using that platform to share the truth of Christ.

## Key Facts

- Organization: Jesus Rules Ministries
- Type: 501(c)(3) Tax-Exempt Nonprofit
- EIN: 33-3630279
- Founded: 2021
- Location: Southern California (Orange County)
- Website: https://jesusrules.co
- Contact: info@jesusrules.co

## Leadership

- Diego Perez — President, professional beach volleyball player, pursuing 2028 LA Olympics
- Michael Clark — Head Coach, Treasurer, Director, ministry and discipleship leader
- Gloria Perez — Secretary, Director

## What We Do

- Compete in approximately 20 professional beach volleyball tournaments per year across the AVP League, Heritage Majors, Heritage Contenders, and FIVB Beach Pro Tour
- Lead weekly discipleship sessions (2-3 times per week) in Orange County, combining Bible teaching with volleyball training
- Run volleyball clinics at churches, schools, and community organizations, paired with Gospel preaching and testimony
- Produce documentary content capturing the intersection of faith and professional athletics
- Operate outreach events where host organizations invite the team for 3-5 day engagements featuring clinics, preaching, and filmed content

## Competition

Diego Perez is a nationally ranked professional beach volleyball player competing on the AVP and FIVB tours with partner Dave Wieczorek. The team's goal is qualification for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics. Michael Clark serves as head coach and travels to every tournament.

## Social Media

- Instagram: @jesusrules.co (ministry), @diegonickperez (Diego Perez)
- YouTube: @jesusrulesministries

## Shop

Christian beach volleyball apparel — tees, hoodies, and hats. 100% of proceeds fund tournament travel and Gospel outreach.
https://jesusrules.co/shop

## Donate

All donations to Jesus Rules Ministries are tax-deductible. Gifts can be directed to specific categories including travel, tournament fees, equipment, and content production. One-time and monthly giving options available.
https://jesusrules.co/donate
